_description: Mantine 7+ component system with CSS-variables theming. Uses Mantine's built-in styling props and style hooks rather than Tailwind utility classes.

patterns.spacing: Mantine size scale (xs/sm/md/lg/xl) on p, m, gap props. Use Container size="lg" or "xl" for page width. Stack gap="md" for vertical rhythm; Group gap="sm" for inline.
patterns.typography: Title with order prop (1-6). Text with size prop (xs/sm/md/lg/xl) and c prop for color. Font families from theme.fontFamily / theme.headings.fontFamily.
conventions: Prefer Mantine primitives over raw HTML (Stack/Group/Flex over div)
Theme via createTheme() — extend rather than override
Use Mantine's size/color/radius props rather than className where available
className for project-specific styling; no Tailwind unless explicitly added
Icons from @tabler/icons-react — size via size prop or style
